MERIDIAN / styleguide
IndexColorTypeSpacingComponentsMotion ›
v0.1 · 2026
01 — design-system baseline · v0

Instruments,
not reports.

This page is the source of truth for every token, every primitive, every motion curve. Pages compose from here — never below. If a colour, font, or easing isn't on this page, it doesn't exist.

surface tokens14
type stops12
easings05
primitives04

↓ scroll · all tokens listed below

02color

oklch end-to-end. One accent.

surfaces
inkoklch(0.135 0.014 250)
ink-riseoklch(0.165 0.014 250)
ink-highoklch(0.21 0.014 250)
ink-edgeoklch(0.28 0.014 250)
paperoklch(0.97 0.006 82)
paper-softoklch(0.82 0.008 82)
paper-muteoklch(0.62 0.012 250)

fluxoklch(0.82 0.15 198)
flux-deepoklch(0.68 0.18 200)
flux-glowoklch(0.9 0.12 196)
iridescent — shaders only
iris-1 / coraloklch(0.7 0.22 14)
iris-2 / cyanoklch(0.78 0.18 198)
iris-3 / violetoklch(0.72 0.2 290)

03type

Fraunces · Bricolage · JetBrains Mono.

Aafraunces · opsz 144 · wonk
display ratio

~1.333 · perfect fourth

body line-height

1.6

tracking

display −0.04em · body −0.01em

display14rem · 224pxMeridian — display
7xl10rem · 160pxMeridian — 7xl
6xl7rem · 112pxMeridian — 6xl
5xl5rem · 80pxMeridian — 5xl
4xl3.5rem · 56pxMeridian — 4xl
3xl2.5rem · 40pxMeridian — 3xl
2xl1.875rem · 30pxMeridian — 2xl
xl1.375rem · 22pxMeridian — xl
lg1.125rem · 18pxMeridian — lg
base1rem · 16pxMeridian — base
sm0.875rem · 14pxMeridian — sm
xs0.75rem · 12pxMeridian — xs
body · bricolage grotesque

The brief calls this aesthetic alien — clinical instrument panels for things that haven't been built yet. Body copy lives at 18px / 1.6, optical-sized for screen. Headlines drop into Fraunces with negative tracking and the SOFT axis pushed past 80 so terminals on serifs round and read almost dichroic.

mono · jetbrains variable
> meridian.read("signal:CLA.churn_risk")
< 0xff42a6  → cohort_id = "2026-Q2"
< 1.873s elapsed · 4,219 rows scanned
< confidence = 0.94 · drift_index = 0.02
✓ instrumented
04space + motion

Rulers, easings, no surprises.

spacing — base × n (base = 0.25rem)
1
2
3
4
6
8
12
16
24
32
48
easings
out-quintcubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1)default in-motion
out-expocubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1)counters, big swings
in-out-quadcubic-bezier(0.45, 0, 0.55, 1)bidirectional
backcubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1)spring-feel
instrcubic-bezier(0.65, 0, 0.35, 1)instrument — deliberate
05components

Primitives. Restyled aggressively. No defaults.

buttonscva variants
card · surfacegrain · hairline

A surface is a hairline-bordered rise off the ink.

Surfaces inherit grain through .surface-grain. The default radius is lg · 14px.

vs. baseline · last 7d

06 — page mark

v0.

One oversized word, number, or glyph per page — breaks the grid on purpose. The brief calls this out. Without it, the page reads like a competent template.

— meridian / 2026 / a stub for the real thingstyleguide · v0
